title: Bulk Lot of Magic the Gathering Cards
description: Description Bulk Lot of Magic the Gathering Cards that were from booster boxes of multiply series during the 2010's, mostly commons and double up's. Condition varies from mint to used (SP). Would say there's a few hundred cards all up! No takers I will just chuck them into the recycling bin. ***** TERMS / CONDITIONS OF AUCTION **** Payment: Ping & Bank Deposit are available. Any in branch deposits will incur a fee. DO NOT do any in branch deposits. Warranty: Brand New (old new stock) item's manufacture warranty has expired decades ago. So I cannot supply any warranty on Brand New items, unless stated on auction. Used items carry no warranty either. They are tested using various of applications for a minimum of 15 minutes. Shipping: Your winning auction is couriered within 2 days of closing. Please allow up to 5 days to receive your item, longer via Rural Delivery.
